s: In 2002, Jeriome Robertson suited up for HOU as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 6.520, WHIP 1.860, SO 6, WAR -0.400.
In 2003, Jeriome Robertson suited up for HOU as a two_way. Key numbers: AVG 0.154, OPS 0.362, HR 0, RBI 3, WAR 0.900.
Changed teams after the previous season (HOU -> CLE).
In 2004, Jeriome Robertson suited up for CLE as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 12.210, WHIP 2.210, SO 6, WAR -0.800. Notable context: Joined CLE.
